subject: Retraction: Fermi GBM trigger 679932336.585264/220719587 is not a GRB
body:
S. Dalessi (UAH) and C. Fletcher (USRA)
report on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 679932336.585264/ 220719587 at
14:05:32 UT on 19 July 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB (GCN 32415), is in
fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a local particle event.

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit the official Fermi GBM Support Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/"
